pages.raw_text:
1t is reported that Harry Baer
and Dutch" Jake, the reputed ten
derloin bosses, are not quite sure
that they want Sheriff Doak re-
elected. 1t looked as though Doak
had cinch vixen the republican
convention renominated him, but
there don't seen to be any great
enthusiasm among republicans over
his reelection. The electrical work
ers have been complaining of the
manner in which he has treated
them during their trouble with the
Washington Water Power COM
pany, and the support that they
are receiving from the other unions
would indicate that they will be
successful in throwing a large
number of votes to the candidates
for sheriff on other tickets.


The bosses are worried because
they always want to be on the side
that wins. They will, If some can
didate other then Doak is elected,
Immediately burn red fire, buy a
few drinks and If possible impress
the man who is successful with the
idea that they were with him from
start to finish. and that his cleo
ton was entirely due to their
effoffrts.
